further_reading.title: Logging Architecture
further_reading.why_relevant: Grounds alert analysis and incident-note workflows in the upstream Kubernetes logging model.

further_reading.title: Debug a Cluster
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides authoritative Kubernetes debugging practices that pair well with AI-assisted summarization and checklist drafting.

further_reading.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
further_reading.why_relevant: Supports the module's accountability theme by framing human oversight, governance, and risk controls for AI-assisted work.

notes: Purely pedagogical module with advisory workflow guidance; it contains no concrete incidents, dated facts, statistics, vendor/version claims, or named standards that require inline citations.
